title: OP Ruby Addon
description: An ancient and long-forgotten ruby returns to the world. Villagers dream of possessing it and will reward those who bring it to them with greater riches than ever before.
body:
## OP Ruby Addon (Fabric)

This mod adds a **vanilla-friendly Ruby** as a rare, late-game resource to Minecraft. Rubies are designed to reward deep exploration and progression beyond diamond, while staying consistent with the vanilla experience.

Ruby ore generates naturally **deep underground in caves** and can also be found **inside woodland mansions**. The ore can be mined with a **diamond pickaxe or better**. Mining ruby ore yields **Ruby Scraps**, which can be crafted into full Rubies.

Rubies are primarily used for **villager trading**. The **Armorer** is the only villager profession that values rubies and offers powerful trades in return, including **enchantment table–style enchantments for Netherite armor** when the correct amount of rubies is provided. This makes rubies a valuable late-game currency rather than a replacement for emeralds.

### Crafting & Blocks
- 4 Ruby Scraps (star pattern) + 1 Emerald (center) → **Ruby**
  
  ![Ruby crafting with ruby scraps](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/fc081aa520a671608dd302b4d1f94f463dfa0286.png)
- 9 Rubies → **Ruby Block**
  
  ![Ruby Block Recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d5cddef76ec182f6eeb07ca79563ff6d5560af52.png)
- Ruby Block → 9 Rubies
    
  ![Crafting Rubies with a Ruby Block](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ff5ec6e2d85abbc08ff6e9f4483fd84805102e13.png)
- Ruby Blocks can also be used as **decorative blocks**

### Important Information
- **Mod Loader**: Fabric only  
- **Minecraft Version**: 1.21.1  
- **Side**: Client & Server  
- **World Generation**: Creating a **new world is highly recommended** to ensure proper ruby ore generation  
- **Multiplayer**: The mod must be installed on **both the server and all players’ clients**
